agent.name: Summit Realty — Buyer Lead Qualifier
agent.goal: Qualify inbound buyer leads (budget and timeline) and book a property viewing.
agent.prompt: You are a lead qualification assistant for Summit Realty. Find out what the buyer is looking for, their budget, and their timeline. If they are a good fit, offer to schedule a property viewing and confirm a time.

summary.name: Summit Realty — Buyer Lead Qualifier
summary.goal: Qualify inbound buyer leads (budget and timeline) and book a property viewing.

recommendations.title: Ensure Qualifying Questions Are Asked
recommendations.rationale: Asking qualifying questions is crucial to understanding the buyer's needs and budget, directly impacting the agent's goal to qualify inbound buyer leads and book a property viewing.
recommendations.suggestedChange: Add specific qualifying questions to the script, such as 'What is your budget for the property?' and 'When are you looking to purchase a property?'

recommendations.title: Standardize the Branded Greeting
recommendations.rationale: Starting with a branded greeting sets a professional tone and is essential for establishing the agent's identity and purpose, which is required for a successful interaction.
recommendations.suggestedChange: Modify the prompt to begin with 'Hello, you've reached Summit Realty. My name is [Agent Name], and I'm here to assist you with your property search.'

recommendations.title: Clearly Offer to Book an Appointment
recommendations.rationale: Offering to book an appointment is a critical step towards achieving the goal of qualifying leads and scheduling property viewings.
recommendations.suggestedChange: Insert a line into the script: 'Based on what you're looking for, I'd like to offer you the opportunity to schedule a viewing of a property that fits your criteria. Would you be available to meet at your convenience?'

recommendations.title: Secure Appointment Confirmation
recommendations.rationale: Confirming the appointment with the customer ensures that the goal of booking a property viewing is met and helps in planning and preparation.
recommendations.suggestedChange: Add a confirmation step to the script: 'Just to confirm, we have scheduled a property viewing for [Date and Time] at [Location]. Is that correct, and will you be able to make it?'

recommendations.title: Enhance Qualification Criteria
recommendations.rationale: Refining the qualification criteria can help in better understanding the buyer's needs and improve the overall qualification process.
recommendations.suggestedChange: Consider adding more specific criteria to the qualification process, such as the type of property the buyer is interested in (e.g., condo, house) and their preferred location.

useActions.label: Appointment confirmed by customer
useActions.explanation: Customer never confirmed — goal not reached.

useActions.label: Asks a qualifying question
useActions.explanation: No qualifying question was asked — missed opportunity.
